Before I reschedule: do you want me to proceed? If yes, tell me one of the following:
- A specific new start (and end) in this format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM (e.g., 2024-05-25 10:00 — end time optional if same duration), or

Note: Rescheduling will send notification emails to the event participants. Also confirm if you want to keep the same location and participants.
